commands: vite install -- --mode=update-lockfile # should install packages first
vite pm pack # should pack current workspace root
vite pm pack --recursive # should pack all packages in workspace (uses workspaces foreach --all pack)
vite pm pack --filter app # should pack specific package (uses workspaces foreach --all --include app pack)
vite pm pack --filter app --filter @vite-plus-test/utils # should pack multiple packages
vite pm pack --out ./dist/package.tgz # should pack with output file
vite pm pack --json # should pack with json output
